description: Style NoteThis summer is the season of mixing it up with fusion fashion - creations by mineral are spot on when it comes to that elusive cohesive combination of trends. This dress is perfect for the contemporary woman who knows how to make head turn without losing her cool. Modern and innovative design details sets this piece above the rest. Product DescriptionBlue floral printed sleeveless dress, has a round neckline with ruffles around it, lace detail and pin tucks below the neckline, gathers from the waist, horizontal lace detail in the skirt, flaring skirt and over locked frill at the hemlineMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash warmTumble dry low Use warm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M which measures 90 cm from the shoulder to the hemline
